title: video-pipeline.02-transcode
description: Outgoing message produced by lifecycle-manager to the transcode topic. Same shape as the ingest message with video_item_id added to metadata.

user_id.description: ID of the user who uploaded the video.

video_id.description: Unique identifier for the uploaded video.

source_filename.description: Original filename of the uploaded video in object storage.

video_item_id.description: UUID assigned by lifecycle-manager. Used as the Redis key (video:{video_item_id}) and passed through the rest of the pipeline.

output_config.description: Transcoding configuration passed through from the ingest message.
